name: capsulemap
description: Repo-native handoff maps for coding agents.
author: CapsuleMap contributors

scripts.check: node --check bin/capsulemap.mjs && node --check src/local-judge.mjs && node --check src/project-scan.mjs && node --check src/writer.mjs
scripts.demo: node bin/capsulemap.mjs init . && node bin/capsulemap.mjs prompt .
